title: Silver Door Numbers Stick On, 0-99, Letters A, B, C, D, 3'' House Numbers Self Adhesive Stickers, For Doors, Mail Boxes, Hotel Rooms (8)
features: STRONG & WEATHERPROOF HOUSE NUMBERS – These durable 3D house numbers are made from high-quality ABS resin that’s waterproof, lightweight, and rustproof. Designed to last in all weather conditions.
PICK YOUR PERFECT DOOR NUMBER – Choose the door number or house number you need from 0-99, plus letters A, B, C & D. Want more than one? Just add them to your basket one by one.
BOLD SILVER CHROME DOOR NUMBERS – Featuring a sleek 3D chrome finish, these Silver door numbers shine beautifully in daylight and offer excellent visibility from a distance.
SELF ADHESIVE DOOR NUMBERS – NO TOOLS NEEDED – These stick on door numbers come with strong adhesive backing. Just clean the surface, peel, and press – no screws or drilling required.
SIZE & FIT – Each door number sticker measures 7.5cm high, 5cm wide, and 0.8cm deep – the perfect size for most doors and mailboxes.
